PreToolUse.command: powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command "$marker='.claude/.commit-confirmed'; if(-not (Test-Path $marker)){Write-Host 'commit blocked: user confirmation required'; exit 1}; Remove-Item $marker; exit 0"

powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command "$date=(Get-Date -Format 'yyyy-MM-dd'); $file='docs/changes/'+$date+'.md'; if(-not (Test-Path $file)){Write-Host 'changes missing'; exit 1}; $staged=& git diff --cached --name-only; if($staged -notmatch [regex]::Escape($file)){Write-Host 'changes not staged'; exit 1}; exit 0"

powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command "$msg=''; for($i=0;$i -lt $args.Count;$i++){if($args[$i] -eq '-m' -and $i+1 -lt $args.Count){$msg=$args[$i+1];break}} if($msg -eq ''){exit 0} if($msg -notmatch '^(feat|fix|refactor|docs|style|test|chore)\([a-z-]+\): .+'){Write-Host 'bad format';exit 1}; $scope=($msg -replace '.*\(([a-z-]+)\).*','$1'); if($scope -notmatch '^(server|client|shared|config|agent)$'){Write-Host 'bad scope';exit 1}; $subject=$msg -replace '^[^:]+: ',''; if($subject -notmatch '[\u4e00-\u9fff]'){Write-Host 'no chinese';exit 1}; exit 0" -- %ARGUMENTS%
